Smart Money.
Zero Stress.
One App.

Finzo is your all-in-one personal finance companion. Track every rupee, manage multiple accounts, analyse spending, handle todos, reminders and notes — all in one place.

Features

Built for real life,
not just the spreadsheet

Everything you need to manage money smartly — packed into one clean, fast, offline-ready Android app.

Transaction Tracking
Log income, expenses and transfers instantly. Browse Daily, Calendar, Monthly and Total views with full category breakdowns.
Analytics & Stats
Visual donut charts and ranked category breakdowns show exactly where your money goes every month.
Account Management
Manage cash, bank accounts and credit cards together. Track net worth, assets and liabilities with live balances.
Todos & Reminders
Stay on top of bill payments and recurring tasks. Set smart reminders so nothing slips through the cracks.
Notes
Capture financial notes and ideas alongside your transactions. Attach receipt photos directly to any entry.
SMS Import
Auto-detect and import transactions from bank SMS messages. Cut down manual data entry to almost zero.
Custom Categories & Budget
Create income and expense categories with icons. Set per-category monthly budgets and watch your limits in real time.
Carry-Over Balance
Automatically carry your remaining balance into the next month so your running total is always accurate.
Light & Dark Themes
Switch instantly between a crisp light mode and a rich dark mode. Both look stunning and are easy on the eyes.

How It Works

Up and running in
under 2 minutes

No account needed. No subscription. Just install and start tracking your finances immediately.

1
Install from Play Store

Download Finzo free from Google Play. Works on any Android phone or tablet — no sign-up, no email required.

2
Set Up Your Workspace

Pick your currency (LKR, USD, etc.), create your cash and bank accounts, and optionally set a budget per category.

3
Track & Grow

Log transactions, check analytics, manage todos and notes. Watch your financial health improve month after month.
